title: So Tuff
description: The average Youtube Shorts experience, now in minecraft!
body:
**This mod adds the average youtube shorts experience into minecraft!
It's very customizable, Press " i " while in game to open it's settings**


Also this mod requires [Fabric API 0.119.4+1.21.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.119.4+1.21.4) along with Fabric Loader 0.17.3

**Content contained inside mod:**

- 11 Songs
- 14 images
- Very customizable settings (Meaning you can customize any option about this mod)
- Custom Media support ([Tutorial on how to import](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zYTdto5GuJs))
- Multiplayer support (Settings copy server Operator settings)
- Black & White freeze-frame (like those sigma edits)
- Emoji shaking


**If you find any bugs please report them to me on [my discord server](https://discord.gg/47EVyvtvKg)**
